texto: I love you, Julie. I loved you that first moment when I looked across the restauraunt and found you. Then you were the loveliest thing I'd ever seen; but now I've discovered how much more you are; loyal and courageous and as true as steel. There's laughter in you and a capacity to love. Julie, Julie, could you learn to love me?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Emilie Baker Loring que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “I love you, Julie. I loved you that first moment when I looked across the restauraunt and found y…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, deep, emilie-loring, com foco em emilie-loring e emotional.
